FORT RUCKER, Ala. — Staff from Lyster Army Health Clinic and partner organizations donned blue jeans Wednesday, April 29, walking together to support sexual assault survivors and promote the message: “Step forward. Prevent. Report. Advocate.”

items.title: Lethal Kinetic Strike, April 26, 2026
items.description: On April 26, at the direction of the commander of U.S. Southern Command, Gen. Francis L. Donovan, Joint Task Force Southern Spear conducted a lethal kinetic strike on a vessel operated by Designated Terrorist Organizations. Intelligence confirmed the vessel was transiting along known narco-trafficking routes in the Eastern Pacific and was engaged in narco-trafficking operations. Three male narco-terrorists were killed during this action. No U.S. military forces were harmed.

items.title: USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (CVN 69) Completes PIA Early at NNSY
items.description:
USS Dwight D. Eisenhower (CVN 69) has completed sea trials, marking the successful early completion of its Planned Incremental Availability (PIA) at Norfolk Naval Shipyard (NNSY). Check out this timelapse of Mighty IKE's departure! You can read the full story here: https://www.dvidshub.net/news/563538/uss-dwight-d-eisenhower-completes-planned-incremental-availability-norfolk-naval-shipyard

Video by Dave Pastoriza, C1571 Videographer

items.title: Washington D.C. Submarine Birthday Ball
items.description: Chief of Naval Operations Adm. Daryl Caudle delivers remarks at the Washington D.C. Submarine Birthday, April 25, 2026. This year marks the 126th submarine birthday, recognizing the U.S. Navy’s acquisition of the USS Holland (SS-1), and celebrating its contribution to naval history and operations. (U.S. Navy photo by Mass Communication Specialist 1st Class John Bellino)

items.title: Navy Commissions Submarine USS Idaho
items.description: GROTON, Conn. —The Navy commissioned the Virginia-class fast-attack submarine USS Idaho (SSN 799) in a traditional ceremony held Saturday, April 25, at Naval Submarine Base New London in Groton, Connecticut.

items.title: USS Idaho Commissioning
items.description: On Saturday April 25, 2026 The US Navy will commission USS Idaho (SSN 799). Idaho is the 5th Naval Vessel to bear that name.

items.title: Navy to start degassing 11th Red Hill Facility tank; air quality monitoring continues
items.description: JOINT BASE PEARL HARBOR-HICKAM, Hawaii – Navy Closure Task Force-Red Hill (NCTF-RH) will begin degassing tank 11 at the Red Hill Bulk Fuel Storage Facility (RHBFSF) this week, marking another significant milestone in the facility's decommissioning process. Tank decommissioning is a multi-stage process involving defueling, venting, cleaning, and ultimately, the permanent closure of each tank.
